candidates.why: Direct top-line sales/revenue line at the top of the income statement; preferred over duplicate total.
Duplicate total revenue line matching Sales; useful as fallback if label changes across years.
Not revenue; this is a cost line and should not be used for REVT.

candidates.why: Direct COGS line and best semantic match.

candidates.why: Clear SG&A overhead component above operating profit.

Clear SG&A overhead component above operating profit.
Operating overhead bucket above operating profit; not a total/subtotal.
Broad personnel total likely overlaps other operating expense components; less preferred than explicit functional expense rows.
Balance sheet asset line, not SG&A expense.

variables.notes: No explicit single SG&A subtotal is present. Selected functional overhead components above Operating Profit. Broader finance expense line; acceptable fallback if more specific interest expense is unavailable.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities

Not a balance sheet equity total.

Total equity including non-controlling interest; acceptable only if no parent-only line exists.

variables.notes: Candidate list misses the best BE label. The balance sheet contains 'parent company', which appears to be equity attributable to owners/parent and therefore excludes non-controlling interest. This is preferable to 'Total equity' because MIB is separately identified, avoiding double counting. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Balance Sheet] parent company
